_comment: The MigrationData lane's row inventory — referenced from projection.json by overrides.migrationDependencies.path. These are operator-authored rows the migration needs (system / lookup / reference rows that other entities FK to) which the live model does NOT carry as Static populations. Logical-keyed: each kind names a { module, entity } coordinate (rename-invariant — resolved to the kind's stable SsKey), each row a stable 'id' plus logical-column -> raw-value cells. Cell values are raw strings (RawValueCodec applies the per-column SQL type at MERGE construction); "" means NULL. These kinds are excluded from the bootstrap complement so a row never loads twice. Keyed to the projection.sample.json estate (Sales / ServiceCenter) — swap for your own entities. Authoritative format: src/Projection.Pipeline/MigrationDependenciesBinding.fs.

kinds._comment: A root organization that Users reference — seeded so the User -> Organization FK resolves on first deploy (the ServiceCenter.Organization <-> User cycle in the sample's circularDependencies).
An order-status lookup that Sales.Order points at — an enum-like reference table not marked Static in the model, so it is curated here rather than seeded from live data.
